title: Modern Sound
description: Loads the sound system asynchronously and implements auto-reload if a new sound device is detected.
body: # Modern Sound Modern Sound includes performance and quality-of-life tweaks for the sound system to give the player a seamless experience. Main features: * Faster sound loading > Loads the sound system asynchronously, improving the games load time and prevents lag spikes when a device is disconnected * Auto-reloading > Automatically reloads the sound system when a device is lost / a new one connected so you don't have to F3 + T (which can take a while especially on big modpacks) * Manual sound reloading > Adds a button to the music & sounds options where you can manually reload just the sound system **Note: You may have to restart your game after installing the mod for it to take effect.** --- ### Checkout more quality-of-life mods:
